Metadata.Title: Gravity Rush 2
Metadata.Name: Skip photo capture (prevent shutter crash)
Metadata.Note: Fixes the crash when Kat presses the photo-mode shutter. On capture, the image/jpeg content-export producer arms a single-slot deferred-callback mailbox, but under shadPS4's stubbed HLE content-export the captured-object pointer at 0x1b20780 is left stale/invalid. This changes the producer's arm-store immediate to 0x00000000, so the mailbox is born disarmed
Metadata.Author: junminlee2004

Metadata.Title: Gravity Rush 2
Metadata.Name: gnf readiness check (random crash fix)
Metadata.Note: Fixes a random crash in the GNF texture-descriptor validator. When that function is handed a descriptor that is null or whose first dword is not the 'GNF ' magic, it falls through to an int 0x41 trap and the game crashes. This redirects the validator's two call sites through a small guard stub placed in code-segment padding at 0x1828b00: the stub returns to the caller early when the descriptor is null or lacks the 'GNF ' magic.
Metadata.Author: junminlee2004
